message:
Fix fourth review: add forward reference notes and connect interactive mode

Review findings and fixes:
1. Added note in section 3.3 explaining that some functions (suggestCommand,
   showAbout, interactive mode helpers) are defined in later sections
2. Updated interactiveCommand stub to call interactiveMode() from Part 6.3,
   connecting the stub with the full implementation
